item.title: Does Your Cyber Security Strategy Include a Perimeter Defense?
item.description: Establishing a perimeter defense is especially important when it comes to areas where sensitive data - a high-value resource - is stored.

item.title: How Retailers Can Ensure Consumer Data Protection This Holiday Season
item.description: Cyber security threats are expected to be on the rise with threat actors use a wide range of tactics to “hijack” online shoppers and steal consumer data.

item.title: Augmenting Security Operations in the Financial Services Industry
item.description: Discover how Financial Services firms can enhance their SOC through multiple methods. Learn more about augmenting cybersecurity defences today.

item.title: Microsoft Azure Sentinel SIEM: Multi-tenancy Deployment (Pt.1)
item.description: Read about how to plan a successful deployment of Azure Sentinel so it can be managed in a multi-tenancy environment with Azure Lighthouse.

item.title: Microsoft Azure Sentinel SIEM: Multi-tenancy Deployment (Pt.2)
item.description: In this blog, go through the actual deployment of Azure Sentinel so it can be managed in a multi-tenancy environment with Azure Lighthouse.

item.title: Leveraging Microsoft Sentinel SIEM to Identify Customer-Specific IOCs
item.description: CyberProof uses Microsoft Sentinel SIEM to pinpoint customer-specific IOCs. Discover how this powerful tool helps prevent potential cyber threats.

item.title: Wargames – Reducing Cyber Risk with Cyber Attack Simulations
item.description: In this blog, read about how wargaming can refine the collaboration capabilities and cyber resilience within your security team

item.title: Protecting Your Organization from Ransomware and Cyber Extortion
item.description: Read more about the different kinds of cyber extortion and what you can do to protect your organization

item.title: CyberProof Introduces the “Hybrid SOC Approach” at InfoSecurity Europe
item.description: Jaimon Thomas and Sinu Peter presented at InfoSecurity Europe on the topic of “Smarter Security Operations with a Hybrid SOC”, here are some key points.

item.title: 5 Tips to Leverage Your Endpoint Detection & Response (EDR) Investment
item.description: Threat actors utilize a variety of tactics to gain access to target networks – using the endpoints as entry points to reach organization’s “crown jewels.”

item.title: How to Develop a Converged IT/OT SOC
item.description: To remain competitive, organizations relying on OT ecosystems must adopt new technologies – integrating innovations with legacy systems.

item.title: Microsoft Exchange’s Basic Authentication – Know Your Weaknesses
item.description: Basic Authentication poses a risk to your organization’s data and the number of threats that exploit Basic Authentication continues to increase.

item.title: Holiday Season Cyber Threats
item.description: Be aware of the main cyber security threats that online businesses and their customers will be facing during this coming weekend for Black Friday.

item.title: 8 Steps to Improving Your SOC’s Incident Detection & Response
item.description: Read how CyberProof’s SOC team collaborates across teams and shares expertise in real-time in the 2022 Cyber Defenders Playbook.

item.title: How FOMO – “Fear of Missing Out” – Hurts Effective Security Monitoring
item.description: Fear of Missing Out (FOMO) can have an impact on SOC efficiency to the point where the team misses the real threats.

item.title: How Cyber Attackers Use the Custom-Built Exfiltration Tool BlackMatter
item.description: Recently, Ransomware gangs started to use custom-built exfiltration tools more often. This blog post provides a deep-dive into the code of BlackMatter.

item.title: Recent Developments in Russian-Ukrainian Cyber Warfare, April 6, 2022
item.description: Security researchers shared a deep-dive analysis of an advanced wiper that was leveraged to wipe Viasat’s satellite communication modems in Ukraine.

item.title: Reducing Alert False Positives with Risk-Based Use Case Mapping
item.description: The number of false alerts can be minimized by leveraging risk-based mapping of use cases -find out more in our blog.

item.title: Why Use an MDR Provider? Forrester’s Key Findings about the MDR Market
item.description: Forrester released an infographic summarizing the key data collected from customers and vendors about the Managed Detection & Response (MDR) market.

item.title: Why It’s Great to Work for an MDR Provider
item.description: Here’s some of what our global team has to say about why they love working in the cybersecurity industry in general, and at CyberProof in particular.

item.title: Considering a Career in Cyber Security? Here's What You Need to Know
item.description: In this blog, read about insights and recommendations into the key skills and experience that cyber security companies like CyberProof are looking for.

item.title: Protecting Enterprises as They Migrate to the Cloud – and Beyond
item.description: With our expanded customer base and service offerings, our site required a facelift. Have a look at our new site!

item.title: Why data protection is essential for your business
item.description: Prashanth Nagendran shares insights on prioritizing security operations to safeguard and ensure customer data in your organisation.

item.title: The real cost of stolen data
item.description: What is the most valuable kind of stolen data available to purchase on the Dark Web? Using an MDR provider can support your financial organization.

item.title: Cybersecurity: new threats, new models - interview with Yuval Wollman
item.description: The American Chamber of Commerce hosted our President, Yuval Wollman for a fireside chat on the changing threat landscape in cybersecurity.

item.title: 8 New Year’s resolutions for cybersecurity professionals
item.description: As increasing numbers of security professionals experience stress, fatigue, and burnout, it's important they prioritize their mental health.

Understanding customer needs, intentions, and behaviors and then tailoring messages to target specific audiences has become a fundamental practice.
